rationale: A logical non-equivalence (not-equiv) is the negation of def:log-equiv, which was missing -- the same load-bearing semantic relation the positive sibling thm:qdist (0038) carries. Added.
notes: The proof is a counterexample structure (def:structure), but the statement names no domain, so def:structure is not statement-licensed and is flagged rather than added (consistent with 0026/0027). The edge to thm:qdist is the valid-case contrast pairing.
